text: An apartment with an open floor plan,  that also has a raspberry, peach and white motif, include an ornamental ceiling, a patterned floor,  a tightly arranged sitting  and desk area with a wide screen television and two small separate eating areas.
Cupcakes sold by the roadside is a tempting sight.
The cows are lined up and stretching for their food.
A man that is sitting down with a laptop.
A room that has a brick wall and wood floorings with throw carpets on the floor.
Two young men in ties sit on a bench with a laptop.
Two birds that are standing next to each other on the grass.
An elephant and calf walking side by side on the savannah.
Chef spraying oil on top of special dish.
A cutting board topped with a couple of tomatoes slices and meat.
